title: Ice Cube Trays Silicone 4 Pack Rectangular Ice Cube Tray Ice Cube Moulds Set Premium Quality Soft Silicone ray with 14 Cubes Capacity - Assorted Color
features: PREMIUM FOOD-GRADE SILICONE:- Crafted from 100% BPA-free, food-grade silicone for safe, long-lasting use. Enjoy peace of mind when freezing water, juice, baby food, or cocktail mixers.
EASY RELEASE & NON-STICK DESIGN:- Flexible silicone construction ensures hassle-free cube removal every time—no more banging or twisting trays to free your ice cubes.
STACKABLE & SPACE-SAVING:- Each tray neatly stacks to maximize freezer storage and prevent spills. Ideal for compact kitchens, dorms, and RVs where space is at a premium.
MULTI-PURPOSE & VERSATILE:- Create perfectly sized cubes for cocktails, iced coffee, smoothies, or infused water. Also great for freezing herbs, sauces, and homemade baby food portions.

ASSORTED COLORS & LARGE CAPACITY:- Bright, eye-catching hues make it easy to organize flavors or ingredients. Each tray offers 14 cubes, providing plenty of ice for parties, gatherings, and daily use.
description: Product Description Premium Quality Silicone – Made from food-grade, BPA-free, non-toxic silicone, these ice cube trays are durable, safe, and flexible for everyday use. 4-Pack Set with Assorted Colors – Includes 4 rectangular ice cube trays in vibrant, fun colors that brighten up your kitchen and organize your freezer. 14-Cube Capacity per Tray – Each tray holds up to 14 ice cubes, allowing you to quickly freeze large amounts of ice for drinks, parties, or special occasions. Flexible & Easy Release – Soft, flexible silicone makes it easy to pop out ice cubes without the need for tapping or twisting the tray. Perfect for easy ice cube removal. Perfect for Entertaining – Make large batches of ice cubes quickly for parties, family gatherings, and holiday celebrations. Keep your drinks chilled with ease! Multi-Functional Ice Moulds – Not just for ice! These versatile trays are perfect for making chocolate, candy, soap, wax, and even freezing baby food or homemade snacks. Heat and Cold Resistant – The trays are resistant to both freezing and high temperatures, so you can use them in the freezer or microwave for other creative projects. Dishwasher Safe for Easy Cleaning – Simply place them in the top rack of your dishwasher for hassle-free cleaning after each use. Compact and Stackable Design – The trays are designed to be stackable, saving valuable freezer space and keeping your ice organized.
